jsonLd.title: Hiring Store Manager at Evok
jsonLd.description:
We at Evok are looking for an experienced Store Manager based out of Vadodara. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Evok:
Evok is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Retail Operations

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Evok!
